title: PolyChess
description: PolyChess is a Polymer-based Fabric mod  that lets you play server-side chess with friends.
body:
# PolyChess

[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-join?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&labelColor=5865F2&color=5865F2&link=https%3A%2F%2)](https://discord.gg/4nZYz3a4KE)
[![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Github-label?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white&labelColor=000000&color=000000&link=https%3A%2F%2)](https://github.com/SunPhoen1x/PolyChess)

PolyChess is a [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)-based Fabric mod that lets you play server-side chess with friends.

Have you wanted to play chess with your friends on the server for a long time? PolyChess is made for just that!

![chessprew](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e078590d5def24f5cce753e5979099fc5ec3c7a8.png)

## New decorations for your world

![chessprew1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9882b03af8594805d1e874199db545e52b09097c.png)
